title: FlashAttention 3 vs TurboQuant vs Paged KV Cache | LLM Stack
subtitle: Three LLM optimization techniques that solve different bottlenecks and stack together for production inference.
content_html:
FlashAttention 3 speeds up attention compute 1.5x to 2x on H100 GPUs. TurboQuant compresses KV cache 6x at 3 bits per value. Paged KV Cache cuts memory waste from 60 to 80 percent down to near zero. They do not compete with each other, they stack.

FlashAttention 3 | Faster Attention Compute

Tri Dao's FlashAttention 3 targets the Hopper architecture with FP8 support, achieving up to 1,000 TFLOPS on H100 for attention kernels.

TurboQuant | Smaller KV Cache

Google Research's TurboQuant combines PolarQuant and QJL to compress the KV cache 6x without retraining or calibration data.

Paged KV Cache | Better Memory Allocation

vLLM's PagedAttention reduces GPU memory fragmentation from up to 80 percent wasted to under 5 percent, enabling more concurrent requests per GPU.
